goals: Review the latest literature and benchmarks on yeast-based resveratrol production.
Identify successful strategies, examples, and open technical challenges.
taboo_or_redlines: Avoid using outdated or unverified information.

project_context.project_goal: Draft an experiment plan for a project to engineer yeast to produce resveratrol.
starter_questions: What are the latest advancements in yeast-based resveratrol production?
How do our current strategies compare to industry best practices?
